title: Reliance Digital Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Reliance Digital Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Digital Global Group! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Digital Global Group:
Reliance Digital Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital Global Group!
